title: Armor And Weapons of Legends
description: this adds more weapons that other people i know wanted
body:
![Every type of armor and melee weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2484e48eb5d43fa5a934ef4e3591c4a1066cb595.png)!  ![the new 3D models so far](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b03162b1c8363378a57cfa3076b5713a50a3093d.png)   Want some new weapons and armor in your game? Now you can! This adds a variety of powerful weapons, durable armors, unique blocks, and useful items to enhance your adventure.

Wield legendary weapons like Deons Trident, crafted from rare Green Gold, giving it a mystical and powerful edge. Swing Luuks Katana, both forged from Red Steel, making them incredibly strong and deadly in combat. If you prefer speed and precision, Uzi's Dagger, made from Icy Copper, and there is also Shadow Steel, Snowy Gold, Lavender Steel and Sunstone.

More weapons and armor will be introduced in future updates, so stay tuned for even more epic gear. But for now, enjoy the new additions and prepare for legendary battles! (every type of new ore needs to be crafted and later i will add that every type of Ore has its own special ability)
